title: Claude Code: Setting Up CLAUDE.md for Your Project
description: Learn how to create and configure a CLAUDE.md file so Claude Code understands your project's structure, conventions, and goals from the start.

resources.title: Claude Code CLAUDE.md Guide
resources.description: Official documentation on CLAUDE.md structure, supported sections, and best practices

resources.title: Claude Code Overview
resources.description: Introduction to Claude Code and how CLAUDE.md fits into the overall workflow

resources.title: Create a CLAUDE.md for your project
resources.description: Ask Claude Code to generate a CLAUDE.md based on your project structure
resources.command: claude 'Analyze this project and generate a CLAUDE.md with project overview, tech stack, key files, and coding conventions'

resources.title: Claude Code CLAUDE.md Setup Tutorial
resources.search_keyword: Claude Code CLAUDE.md setup configuration tutorial 2026

quiz.question: What is the primary purpose of a CLAUDE.md file?
options: To document the project's budget and financial projections
To provide Claude Code with an understanding of the project's structure, conventions, and goals
To list all the contributors to the project
To serve as a marketing tool for the project
quiz.explanation: The CLAUDE.md file is specifically designed to help Claude Code understand the project's structure, conventions, and goals.

quiz.question: Which of the following is a recommended practice when creating a CLAUDE.md file?
options: Including only the project's name and version number
Using clear and concise language to describe the project's goals
Making the file as lengthy as possible to cover all details
quiz.explanation: Using clear and concise language to describe the project's goals is a best practice for creating an effective CLAUDE.md file.

quiz.question: How can you generate a CLAUDE.md file based on your project structure?
options: By manually writing it without any guidelines
By asking Claude Code to generate it for you
By copying a CLAUDE.md file from another project without modifications
By using a random text generator to fill it with content
quiz.explanation: You can ask Claude Code to generate a CLAUDE.md file based on your project's structure, which ensures it aligns with your specific needs.

practicePrompts.label: Generate CLAUDE.md
practicePrompts.instruction: Create a basic CLAUDE.md file for your project.
practicePrompts.prompt: Generate a CLAUDE.md file for a web development project that includes sections for installation, usage, and contributing.
practicePrompts.followUp: Add a section for project goals and re-generate the CLAUDE.md.

practicePrompts.label: Customize Sections
practicePrompts.prompt: Modify the CLAUDE.md file to include a section for FAQs and examples for a mobile app project.
practicePrompts.followUp: Try to add a section that specifies coding conventions used in your project.

practicePrompts.label: Best Practices
practicePrompts.instruction: Learn about best practices for CLAUDE.md.
practicePrompts.prompt: List the best practices for writing a CLAUDE.md file for a data science project.
practicePrompts.followUp: Research and incorporate any additional sections that could improve clarity.
